title: [LTLToCore] Add `assume-first-clock` flag for SV ingestion
body: Adds a flag to assume all LTL clocked operations (i.e., currently, past operations) are clocked by the first clock found in a module. Adding this for some simple cases where I need to lower PastOps - this provides a flow for simple, single clock cases before we have full integration with the Slang LRM clock inference infra.
